strengths: Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at current role, matching the job's AI agent development requirement
Consistent TypeScript and Node.js proficiency across recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital) with proven full-stack delivery
15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud — strong signal for architecture maturity and adaptability
concerns: NestJS is absent from the resume entirely; it is listed as a primary stack requirement and no equivalent framework experience is evident
React exposure appears limited to one mention at Optilyz; frontend work has historically centered on Ember.js, raising questions about React depth
Kotlin/Java experience is dated (2016–2018, robotic arms context) and shallow relative to the secondary backend services requirement
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine seniority and a rare combination of full-stack breadth and current AI/agentic tooling experience that aligns well with the role's emerging-tech expectations; however, the absence of NestJS anywhere in a 15-year resume is a meaningful gap given it is the primary backend framework, and his React and Kotlin exposure is too thin to confidently cover the stack's frontend and JVM requirements without a ramp-up period.
